case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. LYUDMILA ARUTYNOVA

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-30-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ARUTYNOVA, LYUDMILA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-30-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-15-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
